unauthorized: You don't have access to this area.
admissionStep2ValidationDobInvalid: Please enter a valid date of birth (not in the future).
admissionStep2ValidationDobRange: Date of birth must imply an age between 10 and 100 years.

admissionStep2UploadSlot1Helper: Upload a clear copy of your passport. PDF, JPG or PNG, max 10 MB.
admissionStep2UploadSlot2Helper: If you have travelled to New Zealand before, upload any prior visa labels.
admissionStep2Question1Label: Have you ever had a visa application declined by any country?
admissionStep2UploadSlot3Helper: Upload the official letter you received.
admissionStep2ValidationPassport: Please upload a copy of your passport.
admissionStep3Question1Label: Have you sat a formal English Language test? (e.g. IELTS, Pearson, TOEFL)
admissionStep3UploadEvidenceLabel: Please upload evidence of the English Language test
admissionStep3UploadEvidenceHelper: PDF, JPG or PNG. Max 10 MB.
admissionStep3Question2Label: Will you study an English language course before starting your intended programme or as your primary study purpose?
admissionStep3Question2Helper:
This may include:
• Completing an English pathway due to not meeting the current English language requirements for your intended programme
• Studying English as your main study goal
admissionStep3SchoolCountryLabel: Where did you last attend secondary school?
admissionStep3SchoolNameLabel: Please state which school you most recently studied at
admissionStep3QualOptionHighSchoolInProg: Currently in High School (not yet completed)
admissionStep3QualOptionHighSchoolDiplom: High School Diploma / Secondary School Certificate
admissionStep3LastYearOfSchoolLabel: What was your last year of secondary school?
admissionStep3HighestQualificationLabel: What was your highest secondary school qualification?
admissionStep3UploadTranscriptsLabel: Please upload copies of your most recent education transcripts (including secondary school transcript and/or completion certificate)
admissionStep3UploadTranscriptsHelper: Please upload copies of all your educational documents from your High School Diploma up to your most recent qualification, including:
admissionStep3UploadTranscriptsTranslati: You should upload the officially translated and notarised versions of these documents. If you do not currently have the translated and notarised versions available, please upload the original documents for now so we can begin reviewing your case. However, the translated and notarised versions will still be required later to properly process your application.
admissionStep3UploadTranscriptsFileForma: PDF, JPG or PNG. Max 10 MB.
admissionStep3Question2YesConfirmation: Thanks for letting us know. A Sorena consultant will be in touch about English course options that fit your goals.
admissionStep3SponsorshipProgrammeLabel: How will you fund your studies?
admissionStep3HasDisabilityLabel: Do you have any disability, ongoing health condition, or injury we should be aware of?
admissionStep3DisabilityDetailsPlacehold: Brief details so we can support your application appropriately
admissionStep3NeedsEvacAssistanceLabel: Will you need any assistance to evacuate a building in an emergency?
admissionStep3EvacDetailsPlaceholder: e.g. mobility support, accessible route requirements
admissionStep3MedicalNotesLabel: Are there any medical notes you'd like us to know about? (optional)
admissionStep3MedicalNotesPlaceholder: Anything we should be aware of when supporting you
admissionStep3OtherStudyNotesLabel: Anything else that might affect your studies? (optional)
admissionStep3OtherStudyNotesPlaceholder: Any additional context you'd like to share

admissionStep3ValidationQualYearStart: Please enter a valid start year.
admissionStep3ValidationQualYearEnd: Please enter a valid end year on or after the start year.
admissionStep4ValidationProgression: Please fix the qualification progression issue before continuing.
admissionStep5Helper: Please provide details for your parent, legal guardian, or emergency contact.
admissionStep5AddressSameAsLabel: Is their address the same as yours?
admissionStep5ValidationEmailFormat: Please enter a valid email address.
admissionStep6Helper: Where do you plan to live while studying?
admissionStep6AccommodationOptionWithFam: With family or relatives in New Zealand
admissionStep7Helper: Please provide your counsellor and agency details. These fields are visible only to agent users.
admissionStep7AnotherBranchLabel: Is this application being submitted from another branch?
admissionStep7DeclarationText: I confirm that I am authorised to act on behalf of this applicant and that the information I have provided is true and accurate to the best of my knowledge.
admissionStep7CommentsPlaceholder: Any context you'd like to share with the Sorena admissions team
admissionStep7ValidationCounsellorFirstN: Please enter the counsellor's first name.
admissionStep7ValidationCounsellorLastNa: Please enter the counsellor's last name.
admissionStep7ValidationCounsellorEmail: Please enter the counsellor's email address.
admissionStep7ValidationCounsellorEmailF: Please enter a valid email address.
admissionStep7ValidationBranchAgentCode: Please enter the branch agent code.
admissionStep7ValidationDeclaration: You must confirm the agent declaration before continuing.
admissionStep8Helper: Please read the declaration below carefully and confirm your agreement before submitting your application.
admissionStep8TermsP1: By submitting this application, I confirm that all information I have provided is true, complete, and accurate to the best of my knowledge.
admissionStep8TermsP2: I understand that Sorena Visa will process my personal information to assess my application and may share relevant details with partner education providers and immigration advisers where necessary to support my application.
admissionStep8TermsP3: I consent to Sorena and its partner education providers contacting me about my application and related study opportunities.
admissionStep8TermsP4: I acknowledge that providing false or misleading information may result in my application being rejected, or any subsequent offer being withdrawn.
admissionStep8AcceptanceLabel: I have read and agree to the declaration above.
admissionStep8SaveError: We couldn't save your agreement. Please try again.
admissionSavedToast: Progress saved. You can return anytime.
admissionSubmittedBody: Congratulations! Your application has been successfully submitted and you've completed the first step towards studying in New Zealand. Next, your application will be reviewed by our admissions team. We'll be in touch with you via email regarding the result of your application. If you need to contact us before then, please use the live chat or message your assigned consultant.
admissionStep1Helper: Select the programme(s) you want to apply for. You can choose multiple programmes, but only one intake date per programme.
admissionStep1EmptyState: No programmes selected yet. Use the picker above to add one.
admissionStep1NoChoices: Add at least one programme before continuing.
admissionStep1AddDuplicate: This programme is already in your list.
admissionStep1AddError: Could not add programme. Please try again.
admissionStep1RemoveError: Could not remove programme. Please try again.
admissionStep1ReorderError: Could not reorder. Please try again.
admissionStep1ProgrammesLoadError: Could not load programmes. Please refresh.
admissionStep1WelcomeTitle: Welcome to Sorena Visa — Your Global Education & Migration Platform
admissionStep1WelcomeIntro: Congratulations! You've taken the very first step toward securing your place in one of our partner institutions and study pathways worldwide. We're here to help, so if you have any questions throughout the application process, please contact us via the live chat in the bottom right-hand corner of the page. Remember — you can save this application at any time and come back to it later if needed.
admissionStep1DocumentsIntro: To help us process your application and issue your assessment or offer as quickly as possible, please have the following PDF documents ready:
admissionStep1Doc2: Most recent education transcripts (e.g. Secondary School, Diploma, Bachelor, Master)
admissionStep1Doc3: Documents showing evidence of English test results (if any)
admissionStep1Doc4: Copy of visa refusal letters (if you were declined a visa before by ANY country)
admissionStep1DocumentsClosing: If the required documents are not uploaded as part of your application, we may request them later as part of your assessment or admission process.
admissionStep1ProgrammeSectionIntro: Let's get started! First, we need to know what you would like to study. You may select more than one course.
admissionUploadDropzone: Click to upload or drag a file
admissionUploadSizeError: File is over the size limit.
admissionUploadTypeError: This file type is not supported.
admissionUploadDeleteFailed: Could not remove file. Please try again.
admissionStep4Helper: Add each qualification you have studied, and upload notarized certificate and transcript copies for each one. Use the supporting documents section for anything else.
admissionStep4SupportingHelper: Any other documents that support your application — references, awards, etc. PDF, JPG, PNG, or DOCX. Up to 10 MB each.
admissionEducationHistoryHelper: Add one entry per qualification, from your most recent first. Each entry can have its own notarized certificate and transcript.
admissionEducationHistorySaveFirstMessag: Save this entry to upload notarized certificate and transcript documents for it.
admissionEducationHistoryCertificateHelp: Notarized copy of the qualification certificate. PDF, JPG, or PNG. Max 10 MB.
admissionEducationHistoryTranscriptHelpe: Notarized copy of academic transcripts / mark sheet. PDF, JPG, or PNG. Max 10 MB.
admissionEducationHistoryDeleteConfirm: Remove this education entry? Any documents uploaded against it will also be removed.
admissionEducationHistoryDeleteError: Could not remove this entry. Please try again.
admissionEducationHistorySaveError: Could not save this entry. Please try again.
admissionEducationHistoryValidationField: Please enter the field of study.
admissionEducationHistoryCertNotReceived: I have not received the certificate yet.
admissionEducationHistoryValidationYearO: Start year cannot be after end year.
admissionEducationHistoryValidationYearF: Completed qualifications cannot have a future end year.
admissionEducationHistoryProgressionWarn: Your qualifications should be listed from lowest to highest level. “{laterLabel} ({laterYear})” appears after “{earlierLabel} ({earlierYear})” — please check the levels and years.
admissionEducationHistoryDocsMissingHead: Documents still needed before you can submit:
visaShellHelper: INZ 1200 student visa application. Complete each section in order; you can save and return at any time.
visaShellStartError: Could not start your visa application. Please refresh.
visaIdentityMononymHelper: This is when your official name is one name. Select Yes if your entire name appears in only one field in your passport. Select No if your first name and surname appear in different fields.
visaIdentityGivenNameHelper: Exactly as it appears in your passport.
visaIdentityMiddleNamesHelper: Leave blank if no middle name is displayed in your passport.
visaIdentityNameWarning: Please check that you have entered your name exactly as it appears in your passport. We issue visas using the information that you enter on this form. If the information on a visa does not match your passport information, you may be delayed when travelling to New Zealand.
visaIdentityUsedOtherNamesLabel: Have you ever used any other names?
visaIdentityUsedOtherNamesHelper: This includes your birth name, your name from marriage or from adoption, your English name, or other names you are known by.
visaIdentityOtherNamesPlaceholder: List all other names you have used
visaIdentityCountryWhenSubmittingLabel: What country or territory will you be in when this application is submitted?
visaIdentityPrevAppliedNzVisaLabel: Have you previously applied for a New Zealand visa?
visaIdentityPrevRequestedNzetaLabel: Have you previously requested an NZeTA?
visaIdentityEverTravelledNzLabel: Have you ever travelled to New Zealand?
visaIdentityTotalNzTime24PlusLabel: Will your total time in New Zealand for all visits including this proposed visit equal 24 months or more?
visaIdentityPassportIntro: Enter the passport details as shown in the passport or travel document you will use to travel to and from New Zealand.
visaIdentityGenderHelper: Sex, as it appears in your passport (M=Male, F=Female, X=Gender Diverse).
visaIdentityPassportWarning: Please check that you have entered your passport details exactly as they appear in your passport. We issue visas using the information that you enter on this form. If the information on a visa does not match your passport information, you may be delayed when travelling to New Zealand.
visaIdentityStateOfBirthLabel: State or province or region of birth
visaIdentityHasNationalIdLabel: Do you have a national identity number?
visaIdentityNationalIdNumberPlaceholder: Number as it appears on the card
visaIdentitySaveError: Could not save Identity Details. Please try again.
visaIdentityValidationMissing: Please complete every required field before saving.
visaIdentitySavedBanner: Identity Details saved — more sections coming soon.
visaPhotoExplanation: Your visa photo must be less than 6 months old and must meet our photo requirements. Do not use the photo page of your passport.
visaPhotoRequirementsIntro: When you upload your photo, it must be:
visaPhotoRequirementDimensions: between 900 x 1200 pixels and 2250 x 3000 pixels.
visaPhotoAiWarning: Do not manipulate or digitally alter your photo using Artificial Intelligence (AI) or other digital editing tools. If your phone automatically filters or alters photos when you take them, turn this feature off when taking your visa photo. If your photo does not meet our standards your visa application will be delayed or could be declined.
visaPhotoDropzone: Click to upload your visa photo (.jpeg / .jpg)
visaPhotoUploadError: Could not upload visa photo. Please try again.
visaPhotoDeleteError: Could not remove photo. Please try again.
visaPhotoErrorType: Photo must be a .jpeg or .jpg file.
visaPhotoErrorSize: Photo file size must be between 500 KB and 3 MB.
visaPhotoErrorDimensions: Photo must be between 900 x 1200 and 2250 x 3000 pixels.
visaPhotoErrorUnreadable: We could not read that image. Please try a different file.
visaAddressIntro: We use the information you enter in this section to contact you about your application if necessary.
visaAddressHelperLocation: Enter details of your current physical location.
visaAddressHelperLiving: These must be the details of where you are living when you submit this application.
visaAddressPostalSameLabel: Is your postal address the same as your physical address?
visaAddressPostalSameHelper: Select No if you want to receive mail at a different address from your current physical address.
visaAddressContactAlertEmail: We upload letters, documents, and other correspondence about this application directly to your Immigration Online account. When we upload this correspondence, we will send a notification to the email address you provide here, unless another person is submitting this application on your behalf and is the point of contact for this application. Please provide us with an email address you check regularly and where emails will be received without issue.
visaAddressGuardianHelper: If you are 17 years or younger, provide the details of your parent or legal guardian.
visaAddressEmailHelper: If you are applying for a visa for yourself, enter your email address. If you are submitting this form for someone else, you must enter the applicant's email address.
visaAddressContactAlertEmailCheck: Please check that you have entered the applicant's email address accurately.
visaAddressPhoneHelper: Enter country code, area code and phone number with no spaces e.g. +641239876544 (maximum of 16 characters).
visaAddressPhoneHelperSplit: Enter the country code in the first field and the rest of the number — area code and phone number, no spaces — in the second field, e.g. +64 and 1239876544 (each field maximum 16 characters).
visaAddressSaveError: Could not save Address and contact information. Please try again.
visaAddressValidationMissing: Please complete every required field before saving.
visaAddressSavedBanner: Address and contact information saved — more sections coming soon.
visaEligibilityIntro: We use the information you enter in this section to check you are eligible for the visa you are applying for.
visaEligibilityHoldsNzStudentVisaLabel: Do you currently hold a New Zealand student visa?
visaEligibilityHoldsNzStudentVisaHelper: It does not matter whether you are in New Zealand or outside of New Zealand.
visaEligibilityUsedAgentLabel: Did you use an education agent to help get your Offer of Place or Confirmation of Enrolment to study?
visaEligibilityAgentNoteList: A list of education agent organisations follows. This list is provided solely to help you to provide your education agent details. Organisations that have recently been involved in multiple student visa applications are included.
visaEligibilityAgentNoteEndorse: Immigration New Zealand does not approve or endorse education agents.
visaEligibilityAgentCountryLabel: Country or territory where the organisation is based
visaEligibilityStudyingSchoolLevelLabel: Will you be studying at a primary, intermediate or secondary school?
visaEligibilityMastersOrPhdLabel: Will you be studying at Masters or Doctor of Philosophy (PhD) level?
visaEligibilityMastersOrPhdNote: The above question applies to study at any point during your intended Pathway visa.
visaEligibilityEducationProviderLabel: What is the full name of your education provider?
visaEligibilityEducationProviderHelper: Pre-filled from your admission application's first programme choice. Update your admission record if this is incorrect.
visaEligibilityCourseOtherLocationLabel: Does your course regularly require you to study at another location?
visaEligibilityCourseOtherLocationHelper: For example, your course is based at a Wellington campus, but you are required to travel to a Palmerston North campus regularly. If this is not written on your Offer of Place, you will need to provide confirmation from your education provider.
visaEligibilityCourseProgrammeLabel: What is the course or programme you intend to study in New Zealand?
visaEligibilityCourseProgrammeHelper: Pre-filled from your admission application's first programme choice. Note: for PhD, start typing 'Doctor of...' in admission.
visaEligibilityCourseDatesHelper1: Enter the start and end dates for your upcoming course.
visaEligibilityCourseDatesHelper2: These should be written on your Offer of Place.
visaEligibilityIntendedArrivalDateLabel: What date do you intend to arrive in New Zealand?
visaEligibilityPhdDisciplineLabel: What discipline is your PhD in?
visaEligibilityPhdSubjectLabel: What subject is your PhD in?
visaEligibilityPhdSupervisorHelper: Enter the details of your PhD supervisor in New Zealand.
visaEligibilityPhdSupervisorOrgLabel: Supervisor's organisation or education provider name
visaEligibilityPhdPublishedLabel: Have you published any papers or research studies?
visaEligibilityPhdSupervisorOutsideNzLab: Will you also have a supervisor from outside of New Zealand for your PhD study?
visaEligibilityStudentIdExplanation1: We may need to check some details with your New Zealand education provider. If you know the student number issued by your education provider, providing this number can help us carry out any checks with your education provider faster.
visaEligibilityStudentIdExplanation2: If you do not provide your student identification number, we will still be able to assess and make a decision on your student visa application, it may just take more time.
visaEligibilityProviderIssuedStudentIdLa: Has your New Zealand education provider issued you a student ID number?
visaEligibilityStudentIdNumberLabel: What is your New Zealand education provider issued student identification number?
visaEligibilitySituationIntro: We will use this information to help us decide if you:
visaEligibilitySituationBullet2: are not likely to stay in New Zealand for longer than your visa allows
visaEligibilitySituationBullet3: are not likely to breach the conditions of your visa
visaEligibilitySituationBullet4: will leave New Zealand if you cannot get another visa.
visaEligibilitySituationAgentLine: Your agent or licensed immigration advisor can type or copy your answers into the form on your behalf, but these answers should be written by you (or your parent or legal guardian if you are under 18 years of age).
visaEligibilitySituationCoverLetterLine: Please enter the answers in the form, instead of providing a cover letter or Statement of Purpose. This will help us assess your application quicker.
visaEligibilityHomeCommitmentsLabel: What are your family, financial, employment or other commitments in your home country?
visaEligibilityStudyRelatesLabel: Does your planned study relate to your previous study or work?
visaEligibilityWhyStudyNzLabel: Why do you want to come to New Zealand to study?
visaEligibilityWhyProviderLabel: Why have you chosen this education provider?
visaEligibilityHowCourseBenefitsLabel: How will studying this course benefit you?
visaEligibilityPlansAfterStudyLabel: What are you planning to do when you finish this study?
visaEligibilityPlansAfterStudyHelper: This may include applying for another student visa to complete more study, applying for a Post Study Work Visa or a resident visa, or returning to your home country.
visaEligibilityMultiYearLabel: Are you studying a multi-year programme?
visaEligibilityMultiYearHelper: For example, a Bachelor's degree that takes three to four years of full-time study to complete.
visaEligibilitySaveError: Could not save Eligibility. Please try again.
visaEligibilityValidationMissing: Please complete every required field before saving.
visaEligibilitySavedBanner: Eligibility saved — more sections coming soon.
visaDocumentDropzone: Click to upload a file (PDF, JPEG or PNG)
visaDocumentUploadError: Could not upload document. Please try again.
visaDocumentDeleteError: Could not remove document. Please try again.
visaDocumentErrorType: File must be a PDF, JPEG or PNG.
visaCharacterIntro: We use the information you enter in this section to check you meet character requirements.
visaCharacterEverConvictedLabel: Have you ever been convicted at any time of any offence, including any driving offence?
visaCharacterEverConvictedHelper: You must include all overseas convictions. You do not need to include New Zealand convictions covered by the New Zealand Criminal Records (Clean Slate) Act 2004.
visaCharacterUnderInvestigationLabel: Are you currently under investigation, wanted for questioning, or facing charges for any offence in any country including New Zealand?
visaCharacterEverDeportedLabel: Have you ever been expelled, deported, excluded, removed from or refused entry to any country?
visaCharacterEverRefusedVisaLabel: Have you ever been refused a visa or permit by any country excluding New Zealand?
visaCharacterPoliceCertCitizenshipHeadin: Police certificate from your country of citizenship
visaCharacterPoliceCertIntro: Upload your completed police certificate from your passport country below. You must upload this certificate before you submit your application.
visaCharacterPoliceCertWebsiteNote: Check our website for instructions on how to get a police certificate. Police certificates must be less than 6 months old when you submit your application.
visaCharacterFijiHongKongIsraelHeading: If your certificate is from Fiji, Hong Kong or Israel
visaCharacterFijiHongKongIsraelBody: Fiji, Hong Kong and Israel send their police certificates direct to us. If your police certificate is from one of those territories, upload evidence you have applied for it, such as a receipt. Enter the date of the receipt in the Issue date field.
visaCharacterNotCitizenOfPassportNote: If you are not a citizen of your passport country, upload an explanation of this instead.
visaCharacterAmericanSamoaExample: a citizen of American Samoa who holds a United States of America passport but is a national of the United States of America, not a citizen of the United States of America, or
visaCharacterBritishNationalExample: a person with British National (Overseas) status, who holds a British passport, but is not a British citizen.
visaCharacterUploadBeforeSubmitAlert: Make sure you upload the completed police certificate before you submit your application. If you do not, this could have a negative effect on the outcome of your application.
visaCharacterHoldsOtherCitizenshipsLabel: Do you hold any other citizenships?
visaCharacterCitizenshipsAtLeastOne: Please add at least one other citizenship.
visaCharacterCitizenshipHoldsPassportLab: Do you hold a passport in this citizenship?
visaCharacterCitizenshipAddError: Could not add citizenship. Please try again.
visaCharacterCitizenshipUpdateError: Could not update citizenship. Please try again.
visaCharacterCitizenshipRemoveError: Could not remove citizenship. Please try again.
visaCharacterSubsectionOtherCountries: Police certificates from other countries you have lived in
visaCharacterLivedOtherCountry5YearsLabe: Have you lived in any country for 5 years or more since the age of 17?
visaCharacterLivedOtherCountry5YearsHelp: This includes combined periods spent in a country which together add up to 5 years or more. You do not need to include your citizenship countries.
visaCharacterSaveError: Could not save Character. Please try again.
visaCharacterValidationMissing: Please complete every required field before saving.
visaCharacterSavedBanner: Character saved — more sections coming soon.
visaHealthIntro: We use the information you enter in this section to check you have an acceptable standard of health.
visaHealthGuidanceNote: All visa applicants must have an acceptable standard of health. After you submit your visa application, we will check any previous medical records that you have submitted to us. If you need to have a medical examination, we will contact you with more information.
visaHealthSubsectionMedicalCare: Medical care during your stay in New Zealand
visaHealthRenalDialysisLabel: Will you require renal dialysis during your stay in New Zealand?
visaHealthMedicalConditionLabel: Do you have a medical condition that requires or may require hospital or specialist care during your stay in New Zealand?
visaHealthMedicalConditionHelper: You do not need to answer 'yes' if you are concerned that you may have an accident or unexpected illness.
visaHealthResidentialCareLabel: Do you or are you likely to require residential care during your stay in New Zealand?
visaHealthResidentialCareHelper: Residential care is long-term care provided in live-in facilities for the aged or for people with physical, sensory, intellectual or psychiatric disabilities.
visaHealthLengthHelperIntro: Your intended length of stay helps us determine if you need a medical examination.
visaHealthLengthLabel: How long do you plan to stay in New Zealand?
visaHealthLengthHelperCount: If you are already in New Zealand, include the time you have already spent on your current trip. Count from the date you last arrived in New Zealand to the date you plan to leave New Zealand.
visaHealthLengthSixToTwelve: More than 6 months up to 12 months
visaHealthHadMedicalExamLabel: Have you already had a medical examination for this visa application?
visaHealthMedicalRefLabel: Enter the eMedical reference number (NZER) or INZ health case reference number (NZHR) for your most recent medical examination.
visaHealthMedicalRefHelper: Providing your eMedical reference number (NZER) or INZ health case reference number (NZHR) will prevent delays in processing your application. An NZER begins with 'N' and has 9 digits. An NZHR begins with 'HR' and has 7 digits.
visaHealthTbRiskNote: If you have spent time in places that have a risk of TB since your most recent chest x-ray, we may ask you for a new chest x-ray certificate.
visaHealthTbRiskHeading: List the countries you have visited or lived in over the last 5 years.
visaHealthTbAtLeastOneOrNoMore: Please add at least one country or territory, or tick 'I have no more countries or territories to add'.
visaHealthTbDurationHelper: Enter the total amount of time (in days) that you have spent in this country over the last 5 years. For example, two visits of 3 months each should be recorded as 183 days.
visaHealthTbAddError: Could not add country. Please try again.
visaHealthTbUpdateError: Could not update country. Please try again.
visaHealthTbRemoveError: Could not remove country. Please try again.
visaHealthTbDurationInvalid: Total duration must be a non-negative whole number of days.
visaHealthTbNoMoreLabel: I have no more countries or territories to add.
visaHealthInsuranceIntro: This declaration requires you to agree to, and confirm your understanding of, the requirement to hold acceptable insurance as a condition of your student visa and the implications of not holding acceptable insurance.
visaHealthInsuranceP1: I agree to arrange and hold insurance which my education provider considers acceptable, from the period of my enrolment until the expiry of my student visa, unless I depart New Zealand earlier.
visaHealthInsuranceP2: I understand that holding insurance will be a condition of my visa and that I may become liable for deportation if I do not hold insurance, for the period of my enrolment until my visa expires, unless I depart New Zealand earlier.
visaHealthInsuranceP3: I understand that if I apply for a further visa, I may be required to provide evidence that I held acceptable insurance while in New Zealand, as an international student visa holder.
visaHealthPublicHealthAckLabel: I understand it is recommended by the New Zealand Government that I see a health professional prior to arrival in New Zealand for appropriate testing and commencement of treatment, if I have taken intravenous drugs or participated in activities that may have exposed me to Hepatitis or HIV.
visaHealthSaveError: Could not save Health. Please try again.
visaHealthValidationMissing: Please complete every required field before saving.
visaHealthSavedBanner: Health saved — more sections coming soon.
visaEducationHistoryIntro: We use the information you enter in this section to check that you genuinely intend to stay temporarily and for a lawful purpose.
visaEducationHistoryEditOnAdmissionHelpe: The qualification name, institution name, country, and years below are pulled from your admission Education history. To correct them, edit your admission record. The fields below — month, state/region, town/city, and 'awarded?' — are visa-specific.
visaEducationHistoryNoEntries: You have no education entries on file yet. Please add at least one qualification on your admission Education history before completing this step.
visaEducationHistoryInstitutionStateLabe: State or province or region of institution
visaEducationHistoryUpdateError: Could not save the change. Please try again.
visaEducationHistorySaveError: Could not save Education history. Please try again.
visaEducationHistoryValidationMissing: Please complete every required field for each qualification before saving.
visaEducationHistorySavedBanner: Education history saved — more sections coming soon.
visaEmploymentHistoryIntro: We use the information you enter in this section to check that you genuinely intend to stay temporarily for a lawful purpose.
visaEmploymentContinuousHistoryAlert: If you do not provide a full and complete continuous history, your application will be delayed while we seek clarification from you.
visaEmploymentEverGovernmentLabel: Have you ever been employed by the government of any country in any capacity, including as a government official?
visaEmploymentEverGovernmentHelper: For example: mayor, judge, election official, hospital administrator, etc.
visaEmploymentEverPrisonGuardLabel: Have you ever been a guard or prison official at any prison, detention centre or transit camp?
visaEmploymentCurrentlyWorkingHelper: This includes employment and self-employment in your home country.
visaEmploymentProvideCurrentDetails: Provide details of your current work
visaEmploymentHadPreviousLabel: Have you had any previous employment or self-employment?
visaEmploymentProvidePreviousDetails: Provide details of all periods of your work history. This includes self-employment and employment both inside and outside New Zealand.
visaEmploymentPreviousAtLeastOne: Please add at least one previous employment.
visaEmploymentRemoveError: Could not remove employment. Please try again.
visaEmploymentAddError: Could not add employment. Please try again.
visaEmploymentUpdateError: Could not save the change. Please try again.
visaEmploymentRoleTitleHelper: If you can't find your role try entering your industry and locate an 'nec' (not elsewhere classified) option.
visaEmploymentDutiesLabel: Provide a detailed description of your duties
visaEmploymentStateOfWorkLabel: State or province or region (of work)
visaEmploymentOrgFieldLabel: Organisation or employer's field or industry
visaEmploymentOrgCountryLabel: Country or territory where organisation is based
visaEmploymentOrgStateLabel: State or province or region (of the organisation)
visaEmploymentEmployerNameHelper: If your employer is a company, business or organisation, provide the name of the company, business or organisation.
visaEmploymentHeadOfficeHeading: Head office address of organisation or employer
visaEmploymentEmployerPhoneHelper: Enter country code, area code and phone number separated by spaces e.g. +64 123 9876544
visaEmploymentEverUnemployedLabel: Have you ever spent time unemployed or not in education?
visaEmploymentEverUnemployedHelper: Answer Yes if you have had periods of unemployment, or during periods you were not in paid employment you undertook voluntary or unpaid work, or household or domestic duties.
visaUnempProvideDetails: Provide details of all periods you were not in paid employment or education. This includes periods where you undertook voluntary or unpaid work, or household or domestic duties while unemployed.
visaUnempAtLeastOne: Please add at least one period.
visaUnempAddError: Could not add period. Please try again.
visaUnempRemoveError: Could not remove period. Please try again.
visaUnempActivityHelper: Provide details of what you were doing.
visaUnempFinSupportLabel: How were you financially supported during this time?

visaRelationshipsIntro: We use the information you enter in this section to check that you genuinely intend to stay temporarily for a lawful purpose.

visaRelParentsHelper: Detail living and deceased parents and legal guardians (including any step or adoptive parents).

visaRelHasNzContactsLabel: Do you have any contacts in New Zealand?

visaBackgroundIntro: We use the information you enter in this section to check that you meet the character requirements and genuinely intend to stay temporarily for a lawful purpose.
visaBackgroundQ1Label: Have you ever held any religious or cultural position in your community?
visaBackgroundQ2Label: Have you ever been employed in a position where the appointment to that role was made by an elected representative or political figure?
visaBackgroundQ3Label: Have you ever supported, been a member of, or otherwise been associated with any political party, group or organisation in any country?
visaBackgroundQ4Label: Have you been associated with any intelligence agency or group, or law enforcement agency?
visaBackgroundQ5Label: Have you ever witnessed or participated in the ill-treatment of prisoners and civilians?
visaBackgroundQ6Label: Have you ever been involved in an armed conflict in any country?
visaBackgroundQ7Label: Have you been associated with any group or organisation that has used or promoted violence or human rights abuses to further their aims?
visaBackgroundQ8Label: Have you ever committed or been involved in war crimes, crimes against humanity, or human rights abuses?
visaBackgroundQ9Label: Have you ever been a member or supporter of a liberation group or militia group?
visaBackgroundQ10Label: Have you ever been detained, imprisoned or otherwise held against your will at any time in any country?
visaBackgroundSaveError: Could not save Background details. Please try again.
visaBackgroundValidationMissing: Please complete every required field before saving.
visaBackgroundSavedBanner: Background details saved — more sections coming soon.
visaMilitaryIntro: Tell us about any compulsory or voluntary military service you have undertaken. Service details are stored encrypted and only used to assess your character requirements.
visaMilitarySavedBanner: Military service saved — you may continue to update it until you submit.
visaMilitarySubsectionCompulsory: Compulsory service in your home country
visaMilitaryDeclarationHelper: Add one entry for each period of military service. Each entry must be fully completed.
visaMilitaryD1Label: Is military service compulsory in your home country?
visaMilitaryD2Label: Have you ever undertaken military service in any country?
visaMilitaryD3Label: Were you exempt from military service in any country where it was required?
visaMilitaryExplanationLabel: Explain the basis of your exemption
visaMilitaryExplanationPlaceholder: Describe the legal, medical, religious, or other grounds on which you were exempt from service.
visaMilitarySaveError: Could not save military service. Please try again.
visaMilitaryValidationMissing: Please complete every required field before saving.
visaMilitaryErrorD1Required: Please answer whether military service is compulsory in your home country.
visaMilitaryErrorD2Required: Please answer whether you have undertaken military service.
visaMilitaryErrorD3Required: Please answer whether you were exempt from military service.
visaMilitaryErrorExplanationMin: Please provide at least {min} characters explaining the basis of your exemption.
visaMilitaryErrorEntriesRequired: Add at least one service period.
visaTravelIntro: We use the information you enter in this section to check that you genuinely intend to stay temporarily and for a lawful purpose.
visaTravelSavedBanner: Travel history saved — you may continue to update it until you submit.
visaTravelGateLabel: Have you travelled internationally within the last 5 years (excluding to and from New Zealand)?
visaTravelGateHelp: Answer No if your only international travel is to and from New Zealand.
visaTravelDateExitedHelp: Enter month and year. Leave blank if you are still in this country.
visaTravelPointOfEntryHelp: Enter the airport, port, or land border crossing you used to enter the country.
visaTravelSaveError: Could not save travel history. Please try again.
visaTravelValidationMissing: Please complete every required field before saving.
visaTravelErrorGateRequired: Please answer whether you have travelled internationally in the last 5 years.
visaTravelErrorEntriesRequired: Please add at least one trip.
visaTravelRowErrorInvalidDate: Please enter a valid month and year
visaTravelRowErrorExitBeforeEntered: Date exited cannot be before date entered
visaTravelRowErrorOtherPurpose: Please describe the purpose of travel
visaImmigrationIntro: We use the information you enter in this section to check that any immigration advice was given lawfully, and to contact your adviser where necessary.
visaImmigrationSavedBanner: Immigration assistance saved — you may continue to update it until you submit.
visaImmigrationGateLabel: Are you completing this form on behalf of someone else?
visaImmigrationCapacityLabel: In what capacity are you completing this form?
visaImmigrationAdviserContactNumberHelp: Enter country code, area code and phone number e.g. +641239876544 (maximum of 16 characters)
visaImmigrationAdviserIsPrimaryContactLa: Should you be the primary contact for this application?
visaImmigrationAdviserIsPrimaryContactHe: If correspondence is to be sent directly to the applicant, select No.
visaImmigrationSaveError: Could not save immigration assistance. Please try again.
visaImmigrationValidationMissing: Please complete every required field before saving.
visaImmigrationErrorGateRequired: Please answer whether you are completing this form on behalf of someone else.
visaImmigrationErrorInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
visaImmigrationErrorInvalidPhone: Enter a valid phone number (digits, +, spaces only, max 16 characters).
visaDocsIntro: We use the information and documents you upload in this section as evidence that you are eligible for the visa you are applying for.
visaDocsSavedBanner: Supporting documents saved — you may continue to update them until you submit.
visaDocsGuidanceBody: Based on the information you have provided, you must upload the following documents to support your visa application. The size of each document must not exceed 10MB. If you have multiple documents to upload as evidence for the same requirement, combine these together into one PDF file before uploading.
visaDocsDeferralNotice: File upload is not yet enabled — we're recording your file details for now. You'll be asked to upload the actual files in a later step.
visaDocsAreAllDocsInEnglishLabel: Are all the documents you intend to upload in English?
visaDocsDocPassportHelp: Include any pages with your photo, personal details, details of your family, name change endorsement or extensions to expiry date.
visaDocsDocNationalId: Your national identification card – if available
visaDocsDocNationalIdHelp: Providing your identification card can help us process your application.
visaDocsLivingInDifferentCountryLabel: Are you living in a country that is not your country of citizenship?
visaDocsCountryOfResidenceLabel: What country are you living in?
visaDocsDocResidenceVisa: Evidence of the visa that entitles you to live in that country
visaDocsDocResidenceVisaHelp: If you have the right to reside without a visa, upload a document explaining the circumstances.
visaDocsDocTravelHistory: Your records of previous travel – optional
visaDocsDocTravelHistoryHelp: Providing records of your previous travel can help us process your application.
visaDocsDocAuthority: Authorisation for another person to submit your student visa application on your behalf
visaDocsDocAuthorityHelp: Immigration lawyers (exempt from licensing) can, as per current practice, upload a document on their letterhead confirming they are acting on behalf of the applicant or choose to use the standard INZ declaration.
visaDocsSaveError: Could not save supporting documents. Please try again.
visaDocsValidationMissing: Please complete every required field before saving.
visaDocsValidationFileType: File must be PDF, JPEG, or PNG.
visaDocsValidationPassportRequired: Please record your passport before continuing.
visaDocsValidationResidenceVisaRequired: Please record your residence visa document before continuing.
visaDocsValidationMilitaryRecordRequired: Please record your military record before continuing.
visaDocsValidationAuthorityDocRequired: Please record the authority document before continuing.
visaDocsErrorAreAllDocsInEnglishRequired: Please answer whether all your documents are in English.
visaDocsErrorLivingInDifferentCountryReq: Please answer whether you are living in a country other than your country of citizenship.
visaDocsErrorCountryOfResidenceRequired: Please tell us which country you are living in.
visaDocs2Intro: Provide the rest of the evidence we need to make a decision on your student visa application.
visaDocs2SavedBanner: Supporting documents saved — you may continue to update them until you submit.
visaDocs2SaveError: Could not save supporting documents. Please try again.
visaDocs2ValidationMissing: Please complete every required field before saving.
visaDocs2ValidationDocRequired: This document is required to continue.
visaDocs2ValidationAtLeastOneFundsSource: Please select at least one source of financial support.
visaDocs2ValidationAtLeastOneOutwardSour: Please select at least one source for your outward travel.
visaDocs2ValidationAtLeastOneFundsFormat: Please select at least one format your savings are held in.
visaDocs2ValidationAtLeastOneSavingsSour: Please select at least one source of your savings.
visaDocs2ValidationCustomLabelRequired: Please provide a label for this evidence.
visaDocs2ValidationDeclarationRequired: Please check the declaration to continue.
visaDocs2GuidanceBody: Based on the information you have provided, upload the remaining documents that support your visa application. The size of each document must not exceed 10MB. If you have multiple documents for the same requirement, combine them into a single PDF before uploading.
visaDocs2DocOfferOfPlace: Offer of place from your education provider
visaDocs2DocPublicationsListHelp: Required when you have indicated that you have published papers as part of your PhD.
visaDocs2DocPersonalCircumstancesEvidenc: Letters from family, employers, or community ties that show your intent to return home after study.
visaDocs2DocPreviousTertiaryEvidence: Evidence of your previous tertiary education
visaDocs2TookEnglishTestLabel: Have you taken an English-language test?
visaDocs2DocEnglishTestResultsHelp: Upload your IELTS, TOEFL, PTE Academic, or other accepted test certificate.
visaDocs2TuitionFeesPaidLabel: Have you already paid your tuition fees in full?
visaDocs2TuitionPaymentMethodLabel: How will your tuition fees be paid?
visaDocs2TuitionPaymentMethod_PARTNER_PR: Paid by a partner provider or government student loan
visaDocs2DocTuitionPaymentConfirmationHe: Upload a receipt, letter from your sponsor, or scholarship confirmation.
visaDocs2FinancialSupportIntro: Select every source of financial support that applies to your stay in New Zealand.
visaDocs2FundsSourceInz1014Label: A sponsor completing INZ 1014 (Financial Undertaking for a Student)
visaDocs2OutwardSourceSufficientFundsLab: I have sufficient funds to leave New Zealand
visaDocs2OutwardSourceInz1014Label: A sponsor completing INZ 1014 will cover my outward travel
visaDocs2OutwardSourceScholarshipLabel: A scholarship covers my outward travel
visaDocs2DocInz1014: INZ 1014 — Financial Undertaking for a Student
visaDocs2DocScholarshipEvidenceHelp: Upload the scholarship offer letter or award notice.
visaDocs2SectionSavingsSources: Where do your savings come from?
visaDocs2DocBankStatements: Bank statements for the last 6 months
visaDocs2DocBankStatementsHelp: Statements must show your name, the account number, and the running balance.
visaDocs2DocEmploymentIncomeEvidence: Evidence of your employment / self-employment income
visaDocs2DepositExplanationHelp: If your bank statements show large or unusual deposits, explain where the money came from. This explanation is encrypted.
visaDocs2SectionWorkRights: Evidence of eligibility for work rights
visaDocs2StudyIs120CreditsOrMoreLabel: Is your study 120 credits or more in length?
visaDocs2CourseRequiresPracticalWorkLabe: Does your course require practical work experience?
visaDocs2DocScheduledHoliday: Evidence of scheduled course holidays — optional
visaDocs2DocScheduledHolidayHelp: If you intend to work during scheduled holidays, upload the course timetable.
visaDocs2OtherEvidenceIntro: Upload any other supporting evidence you would like us to consider. Add one entry per document.
visaDocs2EvidenceTypeLabel: What kind of evidence is this?
visaDocs2DeclarationCheckedLabel: I have checked that the documents I have uploaded accurately represent the statements made in this form.
